if.test: searchValue != null and searchValue != '' and searchTypes != null and searchTypes != ''

where.if: AND (1=0 OR a.alarm_title ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR a.alarm_type_cd ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' )

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND a.alarm_send_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND a.alarm_send_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyAlarm :: selectById */ a.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_at.code_label AS alarm_type_cd_nm , cd_ac.code_label AS channel_cd_nm , cd_att.code_label AS target_type_cd_nm FROM sy_alarm a LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = a.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_at ON cd_at.code_grp = 'ALARM_TYPE' AND cd_at.code_value = a.alarm_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ac ON cd_ac.code_grp = 'ALARM_CHANNEL' AND cd_ac.code_value = a.channel_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_att ON cd_att.code_grp = 'ALARM_TARGET_TYPE' AND cd_att.code_value = a.target_type_cd WHERE a.alarm_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyAlarm :: selectList */ a.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_at.code_label AS alarm_type_cd_nm , cd_ac.code_label AS channel_cd_nm , cd_att.code_label AS target_type_cd_nm FROM sy_alarm a LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = a.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_at ON cd_at.code_grp = 'ALARM_TYPE' AND cd_at.code_value = a.alarm_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ac ON cd_ac.code_grp = 'ALARM_CHANNEL' AND cd_ac.code_value = a.channel_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_att ON cd_att.code_grp = 'ALARM_TARGET_TYPE' AND cd_att.code_value = a.target_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyAlarm :: selectPageList */ a.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_at.code_label AS alarm_type_cd_nm , cd_ac.code_label AS channel_cd_nm , cd_att.code_label AS target_type_cd_nm FROM sy_alarm a LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = a.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_at ON cd_at.code_grp = 'ALARM_TYPE' AND cd_at.code_value = a.alarm_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ac ON cd_ac.code_grp = 'ALARM_CHANNEL' AND cd_ac.code_value = a.channel_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_att ON cd_att.code_grp = 'ALARM_TARGET_TYPE' AND cd_att.code_value = a.target_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(a.*) /* base.sy :: SyAlarm :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_alarm a
